_README: Birthday Artist of the Day data. One artist is featured per day on the home page: if any artist's birthday (month-day) matches today, that artist is shown ('Born on this day'); otherwise an artist is chosen by day-of-year so the feature still rotates daily. Selection is client-side (assets/birthday.js) so it changes every day regardless of build cadence. To add an artist, append an entry with a documented birth month AND day. 'wiki' is the exact English Wikipedia article title (used for the link and the free-Commons portrait lookup). 'conf' H=birth date + work verified, M=sound but worth a second-source date check.

artists.name: Pablo Picasso
artists.bio: Spanish painter and sculptor, co-founder of Cubism.
